 radio-type 802.11b
 antenna receive 3
 antenna transmit 3
 rate-set 11b mandatory 1 2 5 11
 rate-set 11g mandatory 1 2 5 11
 rate-set 11g support 6 9 12 18 24 36 48 54
 rate-set 11n mcs-support 15
 no ampdu-rts
 channel 1
 chan-width 20
!

line console 0

 password ruijie
line vty 0 4
 transport input ssh
 login local

!

===== 巡检状态 =====
